ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Primary contact name for the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the vendor (Prime or Sub-contractor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vendor company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vendor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address of the vendor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vendor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vendor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendors_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES vendor_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contact within the vendor company */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the meeting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the meeting */,
  "meeting_status" TEXT /* Status of the meeting (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_attendees" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the vendor attended the meeting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendees_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendees_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Manager, User) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor involved in the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Email, Phone Call, Meeting) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the interaction */,
  "interaction_result" TEXT /* Result of the interaction (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
